name: 03 Mar 26 - (9-56AM) Week 10
content:
An obsidian plug-in that helps you figure out what to do - workout wise. 
Or anything else. Really - a simple way to eliminate decision making by setting some rules . 
For eg [[leg day]] requires 5 days of rest. Splits cannot follow leg day. Pole practice cannot follow pull day. 
Inch by inch you go towards your goals. They will be broken down the way you need them to be. 

Solving decision fatigue. One person thing.
